englishFeedback.title: VAT due on sales appears low
englishFeedback.body: The VAT due on sales figure appears lower than expected based on your total sales value.
englishFeedback.action: Please review box 1 and box 6 of your VAT return.

englishFeedback.title: Total value of purchases appears high
englishFeedback.body: The total value of purchases appears higher than expected based on your total sales value.
englishFeedback.action: Please review box 7 of your VAT return.

welshFeedback.title: Mae'r TAW ar werthiannau'n isel
welshFeedback.body: Mae ffigwr TAW ar werthiannau'n ymddangos yn is na'r disgwyl.
welshFeedback.action: Adolygwch flwch 1 a blwch 6 o'ch ffurflen TAW.

welshFeedback.title: Mae cyfanswm pryniannau'n uchel
welshFeedback.body: Mae cyfanswm y pryniannau'n ymddangos yn uwch na'r disgwyl.
